epics.title: Directive coverage — agents + SKILL.md + shared protocols

stories.title: Add terse-output reference to 6 agent files
stories.acceptance: grep -l 'terse-output' agents/*.md returns 6 files (architect, backend-dev, doc-writer, frontend-dev, reviewer, test-writer)

stories.title: Add terse-output reference to 6 remaining SKILL.md (ask, sprint, ship, next, health, todo)
Add 'Related protocols: see /_shared/terse-output.md' footer to 10 shared protocols

epics.title: Wave-2 compression — 7 SAFE reference.md + 12 research docs

stories.title: /blitz:compress 7 SAFE reference.md (doc-gen, perf-profile, roadmap, completeness-gate, bootstrap, setup, fix-issue)
/blitz:compress 12 docs/_research/*.md
stories.acceptance: find docs/_research -name '*.md.original' | wc -l returns >=12; structural validator passes

epics.title: Runtime write-phase directive — 8 SKILL.md + 7 UNSAFE reference.md

stories.title: Insert 5-line Output style block at 8 SKILL.md write-phases (research, sprint-plan, sprint-review, retrospective, roadmap, release, fix-issue, todo)
Inject spawn-protocol §7 OUTPUT STYLE snippet into 7 UNSAFE reference.md (codebase-audit, codebase-map, code-sweep, integration-check, quality-metrics, sprint-dev, sprint-plan)
stories.acceptance: grep -l 'OUTPUT STYLE: terse-technical per /_shared/terse-output.md' skills/*/reference.md returns 7

epics.title: Review-format absorption — caveman-review in sprint-review + review

stories.title: Rewrite sprint-review/reference.md + review/reference.md output-format sections to use L<line>: <severity> <problem>. <fix>. format with 🔴/🟡/🔵/❓ prefixes; document LGTM short-circuit; add auto-clarity exemption for security findings
stories.acceptance: grep -l 'L<line>:\|🔴 bug\|🟡 risk\|🔵 nit\|LGTM' skills/review/reference.md skills/sprint-review/reference.md returns 2; diff of review-report output vs prior sprint reviewed

epics.title: Intensity state + LITE gating + activity-feed rule

stories.title: Add output_intensity: lite|full|ultra field to developer-profile.json schema; document BLITZ_OUTPUT_INTENSITY env override in spawn-protocol.md §7
stories.acceptance: output_intensity referenced in >=2 files (developer-profile.json schema or example + spawn-protocol.md); env var string present

stories.title: Add LITE-intensity exemption markers to 9 skills (completeness-gate, codebase-audit, research, retrospective, sprint-review, release, migrate, fix-issue, bootstrap)
stories.acceptance: grep -l 'LITE intensity\|Terse exemptions\|lite-only' across listed skills returns 9

stories.title: Transition cf-task-type-gating to status=dropped after LITE markers land (superseded)
stories.acceptance: carry-forward.jsonl contains a 'decision' event for cf-task-type-gating setting status=dropped

stories.title: Add ≤200-char message soft rule + non-BLOCKER grep warning for >300-char offenders to verbose-progress.md
Extract HEARTBEAT spec, PARTIAL protocol, weight-class caps, session-registration template from 7 UNSAFE reference.md into skills/_shared/agent-prompt-boilerplate.md
Refactor 7 UNSAFE reference.md to reference shared fragment via explicit import marker and orchestrator Read-at-spawn
Parity test — dump resolved prompt for one representative sprint-dev Agent() spawn and diff byte-for-byte against pre-refactor capture
stories.acceptance: Parity diff is empty or only differs on whitespace

stories.title: Edit spawn-protocol.md:328 — change 'WARNING (not BLOCKER)' to 'BLOCKER — sprint-review fails the sprint if an Agent() prompt template omits the OUTPUT STYLE snippet.'
Add Invariant 5 to skills/sprint-review/SKILL.md Phase 3.6 — fail sprint if any Agent() prompt template omits the OUTPUT STYLE snippet
stories.acceptance: grep -c 'Invariant 5' skills/sprint-review/SKILL.md >=1; one test sprint-review run shows the check firing

ui-audit data-quality flags + UI/UX heuristic audit
ui-audit per-permissions-role audit matrix (5-role + invariants + leak detection)
